name: Meetless Target UI Design
created_from: Khuym UI/UX target mockup approved by user
design_principles: Use one consistent macOS shell across Record, Recording, Sessions, and Detail.
Prefer compact controls and sparse labels over explanatory content.
Show recording health through status indicators, timer, waveform, and primary actions.
Do not expose Meeting/Me source lanes in the primary UI.
Keep the local-first trust signal visible but quiet.
Use whitespace, alignment, and hairline separators instead of nested cards.
Prioritize fast scanning for daily repeated use.

visual_language.inspiration: Reference screenshot's soft gray sidebar, white reading surface, compact toolbar, calm typography, and subtle dividers.
visual_language.surface_style: flat native macOS surfaces with minimal shadow

shadow.content: avoid decorative shadows inside the app

visual_language.dividers: hairline separators between toolbar, sidebar, content sections, rows, and detail columns

components.name: WindowChrome
components.description: Native macOS window with traffic-light controls and subtle rounded corners.

components.name: Sidebar
components.description: Soft gray persistent navigation rail with compact icon+label rows.

components.name: TopToolbar
components.description: White toolbar aligned with the content area. Shows title or view action controls, local status, compact view/menu button, and settings icon.

components.name: MainContent
components.description: White canvas with restrained content width and hairline separators.

navigation_behavior.selected_item_style: blue icon/text on pale blue rounded row

PrimaryButton.style: filled blue button with icon and short label

StopButton.style: outlined red button with red icon and label

WaveformMeter.style: thin vertical gray bars with restrained movement or level variation

TranscriptList.style: timestamp column plus text rows with hairline separators

SessionTable.style: compact table with rows, no heavy cards

MetadataRail.style: right-side metadata column separated by a vertical divider

layout: Centered ready state in main content area.
Primary Start button is the most visually prominent action.
Local Status appears below a separator as a compact checklist.
Avoid large explanatory cards and marketing copy.
avoid: smoke transcription as prominent product UI

active_recording.purpose: Show that recording is active and healthy.
layout: Compact recording panel at top of content.
Left side: red recording dot and Recording label.
Center: large monospaced elapsed timer.
Right side: Stop button.
Middle: waveform meter.
Bottom strip: green active indicator and local-storage reassurance.
Transcript preview follows below as compact rows.
Screen title Saved at top left.
Refresh icon button at top right.
Compact table/list with columns for name, date, duration, status, and detail action.
Footer shows total session count and Local status.
avoid: large empty-state panels when sessions exist
long saved-session honesty copy in primary list

session_detail.purpose: Read a saved transcript snapshot and verify local bundle metadata.
layout: Top toolbar has Back on the left and Delete on the right.
Header shows session title and compact metadata line.
Main body uses two columns: transcript on the left, local bundle metadata on the right.
Transcript rows use timestamp plus text with light separators.
Metadata uses short label/value groups.

content_rules.copy_style: short labels and one-line helper text only; no explanatory paragraphs in primary surfaces
content_rules.status_style: state should be communicated with dot color, concise label, timer, waveform, and row status

swiftui: Introduce a shared app shell component before rewriting individual screens.
Replace segmented toolbar navigation with a persistent sidebar navigation pattern.
Collapse RecordingStatusBanner into compact states: ready, blocked, recording, stopped.
Keep detailed warnings available, but move them to contextual rows or secondary disclosure surfaces.
Use native SF Symbols for sidebar, toolbar, Start, Stop, refresh, back, delete, and settings.
Use monospaced digits for elapsed time and transcript timestamps.
migration_order: Refactor Active Recording panel and transcript preview.
Run xcodebuild test and browser/manual screenshot review if app can launch locally.

non_goals: Do not add export, sharing, playback, transcript editing, search, or filters as part of this design revamp.
Do not expose low-level audio-source implementation details in the primary UI.
Do not pixel-copy the mockup where native macOS controls should decide exact metrics.
